title: Privacy Policy | Brown Immigration Law
content:
Your Privacy Matters to Us
Brown Immigration Law Effective Date : October 20, 2025
Brown Immigration Law respects your privacy. This Privacy Notice explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information, including information shared through SMS text messaging, our website , and other communications.

## Information We Collect
We may collect the following information from you:
- Contact details such as name, phone number, and email address.
- Case-related or identification information you voluntarily provide.
- Information about appointments, consultations, and case status.
- Technical information, such as date and time messages were sent or received.

## How We Use Your Information
We use your information to:
- Send appointment reminders, case status updates, consultation scheduling messages, etc.
- Respond to your inquiries.
- Maintain communication records as part of our client file retention process.
- Comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

## How We Share Your Information
We do not sell or rent your personal information.
We may share your information only with:
- Service providers such as RingCentral or other vendors who facilitate our communication systems.
- Third parties as required by law, court order, or government regulation.
- Our internal legal staff and contractors under confidentiality obligations.

## Data Security and Retention
We implement industry-standard administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your data.
Information is retained only as long as necessary to provide services or meet legal obligations.

## Your Choices and Rights
You may choose to limit or stop SMS communications by contacting us directly.
You may also request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting your legal team directly.

## Updates to This Notice
We may update this Privacy Notice periodically. Any updates will be posted at https://www.brown-immigration.com/ .
If you have any questions about this Privacy Notice or our data practices, please contact:
Brown Immigration Law
https://www.brown-immigration.com/
Email: immigration@brownimmlaw.com
